chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1860 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.7397/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 01.12.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ather Hussain Abro, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for Respondent No.6 Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh along with Inspector Zahid Bashir, Anti-Corruption Establishment Sindh, Karachi >>>>>..<<<<< Through this Petition, the petitioners have challenged the Inquiry No.SK-484/2024 initiated by National Accountability Bureau, subsequently transferred to ACE, Sindh. After notice, the respondents No.2, 3 and 4 have filed their statements / para wise comments. In their para wise comments, the respondents No.2, 3 and 4 have stated that the Inquiry No.SK-484/2024 has already been closed / quashed by the Director General, Anti-Corruption (Establishment), Sindh, Karachi. They also placed on record letter dated 21.11.2025. Para 5 of the same is reproduced as under;- “Therefore, after examining the factual aspects of the above discussed matter and as per approval of the Director General ACE, Sindh, Karachi, the Inquiry initiated on an application dated 15.04.2025 regarding fake appointment in BISE, Sukkur (under complaint No.PE- 121/2025 of ACE South), is allowed to be closed / quashed at this Establishment, however, another three applications mentioned in para No.3 of this letter, are to be forwarded to you with the directions to amalgamate all three and to enquire it thoroughly, at the earliest and to furnish its report, as per AC Rules, 1993.” In view of the above, this Petition is allowed as prayed and the Inquiry No.SK-121 of 2025 already closed by Director General, Anti-Corruption (Establishment), Sindh, Karachi is quashed.

They also placed on record letter dated 21.11.2025. Para 5 of the same is reproduced as under;- “Therefore, after examining the factual aspects of the above discussed matter and as per approval of the Director General ACE, Sindh, Karachi, the Inquiry initiated on an application dated 15.04.2025 regarding fake appointment in BISE, Sukkur (under complaint No.PE- 121/2025 of ACE South), is allowed to be closed / quashed at this Establishment, however, another three applications mentioned in para No.3 of this letter, are to be forwarded to you with the directions to amalgamate all three and to enquire it thoroughly, at the earliest and to furnish its report, as per AC Rules, 1993.” In view of the above, this Petition is allowed as prayed and the Inquiry No.SK-121 of 2025 already closed by Director General, Anti-Corruption (Establishment), Sindh, Karachi is quashed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
